text.title: Agent Eval Harness Bootstrap Recipe Output Contract
text.summary: JSON-schema output contract the subagent applying agent-eval-harness-bootstrap-recipe must produce. Required fields, forbidden patterns, allowed transformations, plus valid + invalid worked examples.

section.title: Output schema (JSON Schema draft-07)

forbidden.pattern: No free-form judge prompts without 1-5 anchors.
No failed trajectory without a replay artefact.
No CI gate that only checks total pass-rate (must check tagged subsets).

allowed-transformations.transformation: Order arrays deterministically by their natural key (slug, id, name) before serialising.
Round numeric values to 2 decimal places when serialising.

example.note: Missing the first required field and `forbidden_seen` is non-empty — schema rejects both.

list.item: All required fields present and non-null.
